ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "ethics_approval" TEXT /* Ethics approval information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the block belongs to */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the block within the experiment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the block (in seconds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the trial within the block */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the trial (in seconds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response made by the participant */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time it took for the participant to make the response */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Whether the response was correct or not */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the participant (1-10) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the stimulus belongs to */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the stimulus (e.g., image, sound file) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "letters" (
  "letter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each letter */,
  "letter_name" TEXT /* Name of the letter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("letter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the match belongs to */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus the match belongs to */,
  "letter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the letter the match belongs to */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color the match belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_letter_id FOREIGN KEY ("letter_id") REFERENCES letters ("letter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "reaction_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the reaction time belongs to */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_times_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_starts" (
  "trial_start_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial start */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the start time belongs to */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_start_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_starts_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_ends" (
  "trial_end_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial end */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the end time belongs to */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_end_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_ends_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
